stemHtml: What is the relationship between temperature of the air and dew point temperature? - Select the correct statement.

options.a: If the pressure is kept constant, with a temperature increase, the dew point temperature will increase.
options.b: Dew point temperature is not affected by the air temperature.
options.c: For unsaturated air, a decrease in temperature causes condensation which will decrease the dew point.
options.d: The dew point temperature varies inversely with changes in the air temperature.
